reviews.comment:
Fui a hacerme la licencia internacional y no pude. Fui varias veces y la persona encargada no está. Un día pone un papel pidiendo disculpas, otro día otro motivo. De los días y horarios que debería estar, no está disponible nunca. La anterior licencia internacional que hice, me demoraron y tuve que volver otro día, porque no tenía ganchos en la abrochadora. Todo Necochea depende de esa persona (German) y no cumple su función.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my international driver's license and couldn't. I went several times, and the person in charge wasn't there. One day they put up a note apologizing, another day a different reason. They're never available on the days and times they're supposed to be there. The last time I got my international license, they delayed me, and I had to come back another day because they didn't have staples in the stapler. All of Necochea depends on that person (German), and he's not doing his job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkd2ExUnFMVFZQV0djM0xURlFVbmRvTVRWcGNIYxAB
